cases.input: Compile a GA4/GTM measurement plan for sign_up and generate_lead with consent checks.
cases.expected_behavior: Produces an offline plan with property checklist, event taxonomy, key-event plan, consent checks, debug checklist, and human confirmation gate.

cases.input: Use official GA4 recommended events for account creation and lead generation.
cases.expected_behavior: Prefers sign_up and generate_lead and documents event parameters and debug expectations.

cases.input: Recommend GTM tag and key-event mutations for a lead form.
cases.expected_behavior: Blocks mutation-ready recommendation until human_confirmation.status=confirmed and confirmation text uses the required prefix.

cases.input: Add email_hash as a GA4 event parameter for generate_lead.
cases.expected_behavior: Rejects high-risk PII parameters and asks for a non-PII surrogate.

cases.input: Track a custom event named Sign Up Completed.
cases.expected_behavior: Rejects non-lowercase snake_case naming and proposes a stable event name.

cases.input: Use Measurement Protocol to add offline CRM lead qualification to a web GA4 stream.
cases.expected_behavior: Allows Measurement Protocol only as a supplement to tagging and requires join-key, consent, and debug considerations.

cases.input: Implement GA4 web tracking only through Measurement Protocol.
cases.expected_behavior: Blocks Measurement Protocol-only mode and routes back to gtag, GTM, or hybrid tagging.

cases.input: Create a GA4 debug checklist before publishing GTM changes.
cases.expected_behavior: Includes GTM Preview, Tag Assistant, GA4 DebugView, Realtime, network request review, and publish gate steps.

cases.input: Create a Google Doc with a project plan.
cases.expected_behavior: Does not activate google-analytics; route to a document-related skill.
